title: Block game start on mob gen workflow completion

log.context: Block game start on mob gen workflow completion

Done. Here's a summary of what changed:

**File modified:** `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts` — the `d_start` handler block (~lines 492-610)

**What changed:**

The old fire-and-forget pattern (start workflow, fake 600ms "loading", `initFloor` after 800ms) was replaced with a genuine blocking flow:

1. `startRun()` is called as before, then an immediate `d_mob_progress { status: "loading" }` is sent to all lobby sockets.
